raw.title: How California’s war on smog and its ambitious car pollution rules made everyone’s air cleaner
raw.excerpt: The Clean Air Act gave California the authority to issue tough pollution standards for vehicles, spurring the development of the catalytic converter and cleaning up America’s air.

llm_processed.summary: The article details California's historical success in reducing car emissions through strict pollution regulations, improving air quality and public health.
llm_processed.lateral_potential: Connects to policy innovation and clean tech scalability.
